Comic Pull List

September 6, 2018

My current comic pull list, as of August 20, 2018.

  • Analog - Image Comics
  • Black Hammer: Age of Doom - Dark Horse
  • Black Science - Image Comics
  • Deadly Class - Image Comics
  • Death or Glory - Image Comics
  • Doomsday Clock - DC
  • Gideon Falls - Image Comics
  • Mister Miracle - DC
  • Oblivion Song - Image Comics
  • Paper Girls - Image Comics
  • Redlands - Image Comics
  • Seven to Eternity - Image Comics
  • Sex Criminals - Image Comics
  • Wytches - Image Comics

Ending or Ended

  • Proxima Centauri - Image Comics (Ending)
  • Magic Order - Image Comics (Ending)
  • Royal City - Image Comics (Ending)
  • Dept H - Dark Horse Comics (Ended)
  • Descender - Image Comics (Ended)

Evaluating

  • Pearl - DC
  • Seeds - Image Comics
  • Cemetery Beach - Image Comics
  • Infinite Dark - Image Comics

Moved to Trades

  • Curse Words - Image Comics
  • Weatherman - Image Comics
  • Black Cloud - Image Comics
  • Kill or Be Killed - Image Comics
  • Stellar - Image Comics
  • Dead Hand - Image Comics
  • Sherlock Frankenstein and the Legion of Evil - Dark Horse
  • Doctor Star and the Kingdom of Lost Tomorrows - Dark Horse

  • Cold Spots - Image Comics
